title: Spear Helper
description: The mod adds a bind that, when held, will cause you to rush forward with a spear enchanted with Lunge until your hunger runs out. Make sure your hand is empty or holding a low-cooldown item like a golden carrot before holding the bind.
body:
# Spear Helper
Convenient client-side(server-side too) mod for PvP players that simplifies the use of a spear with the Lunge III enchantment. It automatically and correctly swaps to the required slot, allowing you to trigger Lunge quickly and move instantly without extra actions or mistakes.

The mod makes gameplay more efficient, especially in fast-paced fights where every millisecond matters.

How to use:
1. Bind the key to which you would like to activate the mod. 
  Options > Controls > Key Binds > Spear Helper > Swap spear
2. Make sure you have spear enchanted on Lunge (3 for better experience)
3. Select empty slot or item with no cooldown, examples:
  Bad slot: _sword, mace, axe_
  Good slot: bread, golden carrot, wind charge
4. Hold the keybind for multiple use or press once for single use.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/U4g3Ogaqv-8" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

**⚠️ Important: this mod may be considered a cheat or macro on some servers. Using it can result in a ban, so use it at your own risk.**

**[GitHub](https://github.com/shuraa-lox)**
